name: Millennial Brewing Co.
location: 1811 Royal Palm Ave, Downtown Fort Myers, FL
notes: Regular live music events. Had last-minute truck cancellation March 28 (5pm–10pm). Recurring booking opportunity. HIGH VALUE.

name: The Pearl Founders Square
notes: Fridays 5–8pm. April availability: all Fridays except 4/24. May availability: all Fridays except 5/22.

name: Wellen Park Farmers Market
contact: Food trucks in & around North Port FL (Facebook page)
facebook: Food trucks in & around North Port FL
notes: Every Sunday 9am–1pm. Multiple food vendors weekly. High activity. Organizer page very active on social.

name: Burnt Store Marina Country Club (BSMCC)
notes: Regular music events. Food trucks operate outside. Freshly Prepped (Thu) and Horse Eyed Jakes / Daves Pizza are regulars.

name: Babcock Ranch / Founders Square
notes: Multiple events weekly. Freshly Prepped books Wednesdays. Papa D's Cheesecake Saturdays. Paradise Smoothie Saturdays (Bluebird Park). Established high-traffic location.

name: LLSN Farmers Market (Local Ladies Social Network)
location: 2101 SW Pine Island Rd, Cape Coral, FL
notes: Every Thursday through April 30. Prefers breakfast trucks. Direct contact info publicly posted.

name: First Christian Church Cape Coral
notes: Two events posted: April 4 (Easter — 10,000+ Easter eggs) and April 19. High engagement (27 comments). Likely recurring/high-frequency venue. HIGH VALUE.

name: Murano At Three Oaks
location: 17171 Three Oaks Pkwy, Fort Myers, FL 33967
notes: Seeking trucks April 9–30, Tuesday–Saturday, dinner and weekend shifts. 21 comments. Residential community. Potential for recurring monthly contract.

name: Slipaway Park
facebook: DM Vanessa Franco in SWFL Food Truck Owners Group
notes: Actively calling food truck operators to book slots. Vanessa Franco is the point of contact between Slipaway Park and operators. HIGH VALUE.

name: RAD Winery
notes: Posted same-day slot need (2–7pm). Two trucks already responded (AK Grill Gou, Red Roc Cravings). Likely recurring venue for food trucks.

name: Health Park (Lee Health)
notes: Regular food truck lunch rotation. Sweeter Society posted about a lunch slot here. Recurring venue.

name: Lee Memorial Hospital
source: SWFL Food Truck Depot (Mamas Meatballs schedule)
notes: Regular lunch truck rotation. Mamas Meatballs books Thursdays 11am–3pm. High employee traffic.

name: Anarchy Ale Works
notes: Regular food truck host. SubTastic sold out here March 21. Mamas Meatballs books Fridays until sell out.

name: Coastal Dayz Brewery
notes: Regular food truck host. Mamas Meatballs (Sat 1–7pm) and Turn N Burn Fresh N Fast both co-located here.

name: Hop-Sized Brewing
source: SWFL Food Truck Depot (Mamas Meatballs schedule)
notes: Regular food truck host. Mamas Meatballs books Thursdays 4–8pm.

name: Point Ybel Brewing Company
source: SWFL Food Truck Depot (Collier & Lee County Food Trucks)
location: San Carlos Park / Fort Myers area
notes: Mamas Meatballs posted from here. Regular truck host.

name: Sam Galloway Ford
notes: Regular corporate food truck placement. Blades of Glory Culinary books 11am–2pm.

name: To Fly Equestrian
notes: "Spring at the Barn" event April 4, 11am–2pm. Easter Egg Hunt, Pony Rides, Food Trucks. Lil Stack Shack confirmed. Recurring equestrian venue.

name: The Southerly at Heron Creek
notes: Apartment community (70% occupied). Posts last-minute food truck requests for resident events (4pm–7pm). Recurring venue type.

name: Bayside Estates
location: 11201 Bayside Lane, Fort Myers Beach, FL
notes: Event April 25, 1–4pm, approx 75 guests.
